column2: A website-ready master taxonomy backbone where one row represents one accepted spider species/subspecies taxon entry.
VALID only. Synonyms and replaced homonyms from the raw WSC export were excluded from this public-facing master sheet.
Import this master sheet into the website backend. Use Family and Genus to create navigation pages; use Scientific Name to create species pages.
The WSC data resources page states the species export is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International.
Taxonomic backbone based on World Spider Catalog species export, Natural History Museum Bern, accessed/imported 2026-05-05.
Display a source/attribution note and a 'last imported' date on VitaMotus.earth. Keep the site non-commercial unless permissions/licensing are clarified.
common_name, habitat, behaviour, size, venom_medical_relevance, conservation_status, image_credit, references, profile_written_by, profile_review_status
